folderPicker.legend: Click folder names to navigate • Use action buttons to select
folderPicker.browserDescription: Click folders to drill down, then confirm the selected path.
folderPicker.emptySearchHint: Try a broader keyword or clear the filter.
folderPicker.emptyDirectoryHint: This directory does not contain visible entries.

onboardingDialog.title: Welcome to openteams
onboardingDialog.description: Let's set up your coding preferences. You can always change these later in Settings.

status.checking: Checking for recent usage and available credentials...
status.loginDetected: Recent usage detected: authentication credentials for this agent were found automatically.
status.installationFound: Previous usage detected: a saved configuration for this agent was found.
status.notFound: No recent credentials were detected yet. You can update this later in Settings.

disclaimerDialog.title: Safety Notice
disclaimerDialog.intro: openteams runs AI coding agents with unrestricted permissions by default.
disclaimerDialog.body: This means agents can execute code and run commands on your system with full access. Please proceed carefully.
disclaimerDialog.importantBody: Always review the actions agents are taking and make sure you have backups of important work. This software is experimental, so use it responsibly.

contextUsage.label: Context usage
contextUsage.emptyTooltip: Context usage appears after the next reply

session.createNewDescription: Start a fresh conversation and optionally attach a default workspace.
session.title: Title
session.workspacePathHelp: Set a starting folder so the team opens with the right project context.
session.selectWorkspaceDescription: Choose a default workspace folder for this session

card.tooltip: Click to view, double-click to edit
